ruleset.name: feipi-pmd-rules
ruleset.description: Feipi lean PMD whitelist rules for S1.

rule.name: FeipiManualEnumValueBoilerplate
rule.message: Manual enum value boilerplate detected. Consider using Lombok @Getter + @RequiredArgsConstructor.
rule.description: Detects enums with a single private-final instance field, trivial constructor (only simple field assignments), and a simple getter returning that field. This boilerplate is better expressed with Lombok @Getter and @RequiredArgsConstructor.

property.name: xpath
property.value: //EnumDeclaration (: exactly one private final non-static instance field :) [count(EnumBody/FieldDeclaration[ pmd-java:modifiers() = 'private' and pmd-java:modifiers() = 'final' and not(pmd-java:modifiers() = 'static') ]) = 1] (: at least one constructor :) [EnumBody/ConstructorDeclaration] (: every constructor body contains ONLY simple assignments :) [every $ctor in EnumBody/ConstructorDeclaration satisfies not($ctor/Block/*[not(self::ExpressionStatement)])] (: at least one public no-arg instance method returning the field :) [EnumBody/MethodDeclaration[ pmd-java:modifiers() = 'public' and @Arity = 0 and Block/ReturnStatement[VariableAccess or FieldAccess] ]]
